title: ML-DSA integration test is a self-oracle (no independent verification)
description: tests/integration.rs mldsa_round_trip signs with wolfhsm MlDsaKey::sign and verifies with wolfhsm MlDsaKey::verify using the same key. This is a self-oracle — it proves the HSM can reverse itself, not that the output is FIPS 204 correct. Consequence: reinforces the self-oracle pattern; ML-DSA is new enough that interop bugs are plausible. Fix: cross-validate against ml-dsa crate or known NIST ML-DSA KAT vectors.
